title: iberis intermedia subsp. dunalii
intro: Iberis intermedia subsp. dunalii, also known as Dwarf Candytuft, is a flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine to alleviate coughs, colds, and sore throats, offering health benefits like reduced inflammation and improved lung function. Iberis intermedia subsp. dunalii is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts are sometimes used in herbal remedies to boost respiratory health.
